name: Research Collector
description: Organize saved links, snippets, and rough research notes into a practical research brief.

assignments.name: workflow_goal
assignments.value: Organize saved URLs, snippets, and rough notes into a research brief with sources, themes, uncertainties, follow-up questions, and next actions.

assignments.name: research_goal
assignments.value: Compare beginner-friendly tools for building local-first AI workflows and decide what deserves deeper testing.

assignments.name: target_audience
assignments.value: Creators and small business owners learning practical AI workflows

assignments.name: saved_items
assignments.value:
https://docs.n8n.io - n8n documentation. Note: useful for automation workflows and connecting tools.
https://ollama.com - local model runner. Note: useful for running models locally without sending every task to a cloud tool.
https://obsidian.md - local Markdown knowledge base. Note: useful as a destination for research notes and reusable workflow documentation.
Personal note: compare tools based on beginner setup effort, privacy, recurring usefulness, and whether they work well together.

assignments.name: source_handling
assignments.value: Treat URLs as references only. Only summarize notes or excerpts that are pasted into saved_items.

assignments.name: knowledge_base_destination
assignments.value: Markdown research note for Obsidian or Google Docs

assignments.name: must_not_do
assignments.value: Do not pretend you opened the URLs. Do not invent facts from the domains. Flag anything that needs verification.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = { ...$json };

const prompt = [
  'You are a research organization assistant.',
  '',
  'Workflow: GP-WF-007 - Research Collector',
  'Problem it solves: Useful links and rough notes get scattered before they become usable research.',
  'Main task: Turn saved URLs, snippets, and rough notes into an organized research brief.',
  '',
  'Important limitation:',
  '- You cannot browse or fetch the URLs in this workflow.',
  '- Treat URLs as source references only unless the user pasted notes or excerpts about them.',
  '- Do not invent facts from a URL title or domain.',
  '- Separate pasted facts from assumptions and follow-up questions.',
  '',
  'Input data:',
  JSON.stringify(input, null, 2),
  '',
  'Research organization rules:',
  '- Preserve every URL or source reference provided by the user.',
  '- Summarize only the notes, snippets, or context that were actually provided.',
  '- Clearly label uncertain points and missing context.',
  '- Group research by theme when possible.',
  '- Create practical next actions that help the user continue the research.',
  '- Keep the tone clear, useful, and non-salesy.',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact shape:',
  '{',
  '  "document_title": "Short research brief title",',
  '  "summary": "Plain-English summary of what this research collection contains.",',
  '  "research_topic": "Topic being researched",',
  '  "source_list": [',
  '    {',
  '      "source": "URL, title, or source label",',
  '      "provided_context": "What the user provided about this source",',
  '      "source_type": "url, note, excerpt, idea, or unknown",',
  '      "verification_needed": "What should be checked before relying on this source"',
  '    }',
  '  ],',
  '  "key_findings": ["Finding grounded in the provided notes"],',
  '  "themes": [',
  '    {',
  '      "theme": "Theme name",',
  '      "notes": ["Relevant note"],',
  '      "why_it_matters": "Why this theme matters to the research goal"',
  '    }',
  '  ],',
  '  "assumptions_or_uncertainties": ["Thing that is not confirmed yet"],',
  '  "follow_up_questions": ["Question to answer next"],',
  '  "recommended_next_actions": ["Practical next action"],',
  '  "knowledge_base_tags": ["tag-one", "tag-two"],',
  '  "review_note": "Short human review reminder."',
  '}',
  '',
  'Final reminder: output JSON only. No Markdown fence. No explanation before or after the JSON.'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...input, prompt } }];
